creator: glarkin@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->analyzed

This is a new port that will be created at www/smarty3.  I'll rename the 
existing www/smarty port to www/smarty2 and update it to 2.6.27, which was 
released recently.  Once the 2.x.x branch is EOL, I'll mark www/smarty2 for 
removal.
